shared/market_data_provider.py.purpose: read-only Alpaca-data fetcher decoupled from broker module

shared/shadow_opportunity_generator.py.purpose: wraps backtest/strategies.py pure signal functions to produce REAL_MARKET_DATA records

shared/shadow_outcome_resolver.py.purpose: resolves PENDING records via fresh snapshots after 1h horizon; SHADOW_OUTCOME only

v329_followups.title: GEMINI_RECOVERY_PLUS_BROKER_PAPER_CANARY_UNLOCK_ORCHESTRATOR
v329_followups.problem: v3.28.3 wired per-agent prompts but every Gemini call returned LLM_PROVIDER_CALL_FAILED. Operator wanted a deterministic, evidence-gated path toward broker-paper canary unlock without enabling live trading, without bypassing evidence thresholds, and without letting LLM agents directly execute orders.

fix.part_a_gemini_recovery: shared/gemini_model_selector.py adds discover_models + select_model + classify_http_status (7 failure categories). shared/llm_provider_client.py: Gemini branch consults selector, ProviderResponse gains 5 diagnostic fields. scripts/smoke_test_gemini_provider.py: NEW one-call smoke test, 8 statuses. Workflow: model_override input + smoke step + default switched to gemini-flash-latest.
fix.part_b_strategy_alignment: shared/llm_strategy_alignment.py is a NEW pure gate. 7 statuses. Scans every advisory row for unsafe phrase patterns + safety-critical bools. Requires quality status ACCEPTABLE + at least one row carries PROVIDER_USED for PASS.
fix.part_c_canary_unlock_orchestrator: docs/BROKER_PAPER_CANARY_UNLOCK_CONTRACT.md (6 stages, 21 hard gates). shared/broker_paper_canary_unlock.py: NEW read-only evaluator with 11 statuses. scripts/evaluate_broker_paper_canary_unlock.py: default --evaluate-only. configs/broker_paper_canary.json: conservative limits + canary_execution_flag_present=false. .github/workflows/broker-paper-canary-unlock-evaluator.yml: daily read-only workflow.

v3283_followups.title: GEMINI_ADVISORY_QUALITY_CALIBRATION
v3283_followups.problem: v3.28.2 confirmed Gemini was reachable end-to-end and produced 5 schema-valid advisory rows, but every row carried the same placeholder recommendation because the v3.28 runner loop never actually called shared/llm_provider_client.call_provider() per agent — the prompt builder did not exist and the loop wrote a hard-coded string instead.

fix.per_agent_prompts_added: scripts/run_llm_advisory_mesh.py gained _AGENT_PROMPT_TEMPLATES (one per registered agent) + _evidence_summary_for_agent + _build_prompt that joins template + evidence + safety footer + JSON-only response sentinel.
fix.real_provider_calls_wired: Runner loop now invokes call_provider(prompt, max_tokens=512) per agent. Mock provider still returns PROVIDER_SKIPPED_DISABLED. Gemini / Anthropic / OpenAI paths return PROVIDER_USED when successful.
fix.response_parser_added: _parse_provider_response_into_row_fields handles direct JSON, ```json``` fences, embedded JSON, and prose-only responses. Confidence clamped to [0,1]. Risks and next-actions arrays capped at 6 items.
fix.quality_guard_added: shared/llm_advisory_quality.py is a new pure module. 7 statuses; SECRET_LEAK and UNSAFE are BLOCKING_STATUSES.
fix.quality_status_emitted: Runner summary carries quality_status + quality_report. write_quality_artifact() writes learning-loop/llm_advisory/quality_review_latest.json + docs/LLM_ADVISORY_QUALITY_REVIEW.md.
fix.per_run_budget_override_added: shared/llm_agent_budget.py honours LLM_AGENT_PER_RUN_BUDGET_OVERRIDE only when LLM_FREE_ONLY=true AND LLM_PROVIDER=gemini, clamped to [1,11]. Workflow exposes per_run_budget_override input.
fix.schema_extended_with_optional_provider_s: learning-loop/llm_advisory/schema.json adds optional provider_status field. All pinned safety enums unchanged.

v3282_followups.title: GEMINI_FREE_PROVIDER_AND_CLOUD_ADVISORY_MESH_ACTIVATION
v3282_followups.problem: v3.28 mesh shipped with anthropic / openai / offline_mock providers. The operator did not want paid API usage. Gemini AI Studio offers a free tier with sufficient quality for the L0..L4 advisory layer. v3.28.2 adds Gemini as a free-first provider, gates paid providers behind a new LLM_FREE_ONLY policy, and adds a cloud-side activation helper that uses gh CLI to detect secret NAMES (never values) and set non-secret repo variables.

fix.free_only_policy_added: shared/llm_provider_client.py reads LLM_FREE_ONLY (default true). When true, paid providers (anthropic, openai) return LLM_PROVIDER_BLOCKED_BY_FREE_ONLY BEFORE any key lookup or network call. Set LLM_FREE_ONLY=false to opt in to paid providers.
fix.gemini_provider_added: shared/llm_provider_client.py gained a gemini branch. Default model gemini-2.5-flash-lite (configurable via GEMINI_MODEL env). Key from GEMINI_API_KEY env. Gemini-specific HTTP 400/404 routed to LLM_PROVIDER_MODEL_ERROR. Response parser handles candidates[0].content.parts[0].text shape.
fix.mesh_runner_extended: scripts/run_llm_advisory_mesh.py gained a free-only gate. Paid provider + LLM_FREE_ONLY=true returns LLM_ADVISORY_MESH_SKIPPED_PROVIDER_BLOCKED_BY_FREE_ONLY. Summary always carries selected_provider + llm_free_only. Version bumped to v3.28.2.
fix.workflow_extended: .github/workflows/llm-advisory-mesh.yml gained GEMINI_API_KEY (from secrets) + GEMINI_MODEL (repo var, default gemini-2.5-flash-lite) + LLM_FREE_ONLY (repo var, default 'true'). All 7 broker-execution env flags remain hard-pinned 'false'. No broker secrets added.
fix.activation_helper_added: scripts/activate_llm_advisory_mesh.py is a cloud-side helper. Modes: --check-only (default), --set-vars, --trigger. Uses gh secret list --json name to detect NAMES only — NEVER reads or prints values. Schedule stays disabled by default.

v328_followups.title: CLOUD_LLM_ADVISORY_MESH_ACROSS_TRADING_PROCESS
v328_followups.problem: Pre-v3.28 the repository had per-monitor LLM curators and a learning-loop client driven by Anthropic Routines (poll-based via claude.ai). None of them could run from a cloud automation context using an LLM provider API key, and each shipped its own ad-hoc safety contract. The operator needed cloud-callable LLM advisory across the whole process (signal review, no-signal diagnostic, shadow outcome review, pre-order advisory, risk narrative, risk-gate proposal, incident review, broker-paper canary review) with hard execution-authority bounds.

fix.authority_model_added: docs/LLM_AUTHORITY_MODEL.md defines six levels (L0_OBSERVE_ONLY..L4_PROPOSE_CONFIG_CHANGE_ONLY + L5_EXECUTE_FORBIDDEN sentinel). L5 is non-assignable; the registry constructor raises on attempt.
fix.advisory_schema_added: learning-loop/llm_advisory/schema.json pins seven safety-critical fields as JSON Schema enums (advisory_only=[true], may_execute / may_modify_risk / may_unlock_broker_paper / broker_order_submitted / broker_execution_enabled / affects_readiness_gate all =[false]). Authority enum excludes L5.
fix.budget_governor_added: shared/llm_agent_budget.py defaults LLM_AGENTS_ENABLED=false. Per-day 20 calls, per-run 5 calls, $1.00 cost cap. Six statuses. Fail-soft.
fix.provider_client_added: shared/llm_provider_client.py supports anthropic / openai / offline_mock. Default offline_mock makes no network calls. Six statuses. Response text redacted for secret-shaped tokens.
fix.agent_registry_added: shared/llm_advisory_registry.py canonicalises 11 agents. Each agent carries all 10 forbidden capability tokens in its forbidden_actions list (asserted by constructor).
fix.pre_order_advisory_added: shared/llm_pre_order_advisory.py verdict enum has no EXECUTE token. is_blocking() returns True only when verdict=ADVISORY_VETO_RECOMMENDED AND LLM_PRE_ORDER_VETO_HONORED=true (default false).
fix.risk_proposal_added: shared/llm_risk_change_proposal.py enforces auto_apply=False, requires_operator_approval=True, advisory_only=True at construction. applies_to_risk_config() is a hard return False. No file-write helpers in source.
fix.mesh_runner_added: scripts/run_llm_advisory_mesh.py default returns LLM_ADVISORY_MESH_SKIPPED_DISABLED. Refuses on any truthy broker-execution env flag. Validates every emitted row against schema. Outputs append-only JSONL + rendered markdown.
fix.workflow_added: .github/workflows/llm-advisory-mesh.yml is workflow_dispatch by default; scheduled cron only when repo variable LLM_AGENTS_SCHEDULED=true. All 7 broker-execution env flags hard-pinned false. Provider keys via secrets; offline_mock path safe with zero secrets. Tight commit allow-list.

v3273_followups.title: NOTIFICATION_FLOOD_GUARD_AND_INCIDENT_CRITICAL_DIGEST
v3273_followups.problem: shared/notify.py's _CRITICAL_MARKERS shipped [INCIDENT-CRITICAL] through the SMTP fast-path. The 5-min incident-pattern-detector cron, when re-detecting the same condition on every tick, generated hundreds of identical critical emails per hour. The truly actionable first alert was buried in the noise; the operator's inbox became unusable. Critical visibility had to be preserved without flooding the mailbox.

fix.flood_guard_module_added: shared/notification_flood_guard.py is a pure-function flood guard. Public surface: normalize_subject, incident_fingerprint, should_send_immediate, apply_verdict, evaluate_and_record, load_flood_state, save_flood_state, record_notification_decision. Six verdicts: FLOOD_SEND_FIRST / FLOOD_SEND_ESCALATION / FLOOD_DIGEST / FLOOD_BLOCK_HOURLY_CAP / FLOOD_BLOCK_DAILY_CAP / FLOOD_BYPASS_DISABLED.
fix.notify_wire_in: shared/notify.py::send_email gained a _consult_flood_guard helper inserted AFTER the v3.13 classifier resolves to 'send' — so off/suppress/digest short-circuits are preserved. The flood guard only gates flood-guarded prefixes (default: [INCIDENT-CRITICAL]); all other subjects fall through to SMTP. Sending verdicts proceed to SMTP. Digest verdicts also call the standard _append_to_digest so the operator can still see digested events through the existing digest pipeline.
fix.digest_script_added: scripts/send_incident_digest.py aggregates the day's audit JSONL + digest JSONL into ONE summary email ([INCIDENT-DIGEST] YYYY-MM-DD — N unique, M immediate, K digested). Sends AT MOST ONE email per invocation regardless of input size. Refuses (exit 1) on any truthy broker-execution env flag. NEVER imports the broker-orders module.
fix.legacy_test_isolation: tests/test_notify_policy_v3131.py::_reload_notify extended to isolate flood-guard state per call (NOTIFY_FLOOD_STATE_DIR + NOTIFY_DIGEST_DIR pointed at tempfile.mkdtemp()) so the legacy v3.13 baseline does not collide with on-repo state files written by production runs.
fix.docs_added: docs/NOTIFICATION_POLICY.md is the new canonical reference: layered routing, six verdicts, fingerprinting algorithm, env knobs table, always-send markers, on-disk artefacts, operator persona tuning, hard safety invariants, test coverage.

shared/notification_flood_guard.py.purpose: pure-function notification flood guard (fingerprint + cooldown + caps + audit)

scripts/send_incident_digest.py.purpose: daily incident digest aggregator — one summary email per invocation

v3272_followups.title: AUTOMATED_EVIDENCE_PROGRESS_MONITOR_AND_NO_SIGNAL_REMEDIATION
v3272_followups.problem: After v3.27.1 shipped, the operator could see WHY one tick produced no signals, but had no deterministic answer to: 'is the pipeline making progress toward 50 real opportunities / 20 outcomes, or is it stuck on the same failure mode tick after tick?' Without a multi-run trend monitor, even a healthy pipeline that quietly never emits a real-market record would look indistinguishable from a stuck pipeline.

fix.multi_run_monitor_added: scripts/monitor_automated_shadow_progress.py runs after the v3.27.1 evaluator each cron tick. It appends the latest workflow_health_latest.json snapshot to a rolling history (workflow_health_history.jsonl) and applies a deterministic 8-status rule matrix.
fix.history_jsonl_added: learning-loop/shadow_evidence/workflow_health_history.jsonl is APPEND-ONLY, idempotent on (workflow_run_id, generated_at_iso). The monitor never rewrites or truncates this file.
fix.first_record_artifact_added: learning-loop/shadow_evidence/first_real_market_record_status.json gives the operator a single visible answer to 'has any REAL_MARKET_DATA record landed yet?' Stays false until a record carrying evidence_quality==REAL_MARKET_DATA exists on disk; scaffold and halt-path records do NOT flip the flag.
fix.lookback_override_added: scripts/run_signal_shadow_evidence_collection.py reads SHADOW_MARKET_DATA_LOOKBACK_DAYS (default 40) wrapped in max(22, ...). The 22-bar ATR safety floor CANNOT be weakened by env override; tests/test_shadow_lookback_v3272.py::test_collector_clamp_uses_max_22 pins this in source.
fix.workflow_wire_in: .github/workflows/signal-shadow-evidence.yml adds a 'Monitor multi-run automated evidence progress (v3.27.2)' step after the v3.27.1 evaluator. The existing umbrella allow-list (learning-loop/shadow_evidence/*) covers the two new artifacts; no allow-list widening is needed.

scripts/monitor_automated_shadow_progres.purpose: multi-run automated evidence progress monitor (rule-matrix + first-record artifact + append-only history)

deferred_to_v328.OBSERVATION_RECORD_or_NO_TRADE_OBSERVATI: Adding a second evidence_quality value (or a NO_TRADE_OBSERVATION decision_type) was scoped in v3.27.2's spec but deferred. Reason: introducing it touches the v3.27.0+v3.27.1 record contracts and the v3.25 readiness gate semantics. The conservative path is to wait until repeated AUTOMATED_EVIDENCE_STUCK_GENERATOR_TOO_RESTRICTIVE verdicts demonstrate concrete demand. v3.27.2 keeps zero schema risk.

v3272_followups.interpretation_of_current_status: Only one health snapshot exists in the history so far (the v3.27.1 smoke run). The monitor correctly requires at least 2 successful runs before applying any trend rule. After 2 successful cron ticks during US market session, the monitor will produce either AUTOMATED_EVIDENCE_HEALTHY_BUT_NO_SIGNALS_YET (quiet but healthy) or a STUCK_* status. No operator action is required.

v3271_followups.title: AUTOMATED_SHADOW_WORKFLOW_HEALTHCHECK_AND_DIAGNOSTIC_SPLIT
v3271_followups.problem: The v3.27.0 cron driver runs end-to-end (workflow_dispatch run 27217673054 succeeded in 27s, secrets validated, push committed via [automerge]) but emits HALT_PATH_ONLY evidence whenever the collector cannot turn a snapshot into a signal. That single token conflates: missing credentials, 401/403 auth, generic provider error, empty payload, market closed / no bars, stale data, insufficient bars for ATR window, real data but no signal yet, and real data with a signal record emitted. The audit board (and the operator) cannot tell whether the automated pipeline is healthy-but-quiet or silently stuck.

fix.diagnostic_token_split: shared/market_data_provider.py exposes ALL_STATUS_TOKENS (9 tokens). Every quote return path attaches one token. New helper fetch_daily_bars_diagnostic returns (bars, status_token) distinguishing the four bar-fetch failure modes that v3.27.0's fetch_daily_bars silently coalesced to None. MarketSnapshot.status_token added (optional during the v3.27.0 -> v3.27.1 transition).
fix.collector_per_symbol_diagnostics: scripts/run_signal_shadow_evidence_collection.py aggregates per_symbol_diagnostics list. Every symbol considered surfaces with {symbol, status_token, reason} so the operator can see distribution across the universe in a single cron tick.
fix.evaluator_added: scripts/evaluate_automated_shadow_progress.py is a pure-function verdict evaluator (6 verdicts: HEALTHY_NO_REAL_DATA_YET / HEALTHY_COLLECTING_REAL_MARKET_DATA / BLOCKED_NO_SECRETS / BLOCKED_PROVIDER_ERROR / BLOCKED_WORKFLOW_FAILURE / BLOCKED_SCHEMA_OR_COUNTER_ERROR). Standing markers BROKER_PAPER_CANARY_STILL_BLOCKED + LIVE_TRADING_UNSUPPORTED returned with every verdict. Refuses (exit 1) if any of 7 broker-execution env flags is truthy.
fix.workflow_wire_in: .github/workflows/signal-shadow-evidence.yml gained an 'Evaluate automated pipeline health' step; commit allow-list extended to include docs/AUTOMATED_SHADOW_WORKFLOW_HEALTH.md.

scripts/evaluate_automated_shadow_progre.purpose: automated shadow workflow healthcheck evaluator (pure verdict function + artifact writers)

v3271_followups.interpretation_of_current_verdict: Workflow runs end-to-end; collector path is healthy; the v3.27.0 first dispatch found no signals because strategies did not fire on today's bars during the partial dispatch window (the strategy modules require ATR-window history that the dispatch was unable to render into a fresh signal during smoke). v3.27.1's diagnostic split will surface, for each future cron tick, exactly which symbols hit each of the 9 modes so the operator can see whether the silence is healthy (REAL_MARKET_DATA_AVAILABLE_BUT_NO_SIGNAL on every symbol) or stuck (PROVIDER_ERROR / AUTH_FAILED / CREDENTIALS_MISSING dominating).

v3261_followups.title: DAILY_SIGNAL_SHADOW_RUN_CHECK_AND_EVIDENCE_QUALITY_DISTINCTION
v3261_followups.problem: v3.26.0 collector incremented normal_non_halt_opportunities_count for every record it emitted, including SCAFFOLD records produced under --allow-without-market-data. That feeds the v3.25 broker-paper readiness gate; treating scaffold records as real-market evidence would prematurely flip the verdict.

fix.schema_change: added 'evidence_quality' field (REAL_MARKET_DATA | SCAFFOLD_NO_MARKET_DATA | HALT_PATH_ONLY) to shadow record schema, marked required.
fix.collector_routing: scaffold runs now increment scaffold_no_market_data_records_count instead of normal_non_halt_opportunities_count. halt-path runs increment halt_path_records_count + halt_path_opportunities_count. Real-market runs would increment real_market_opportunities_count (and normal_non_halt_opportunities_count for backward compatibility) — but no real-market wiring exists yet, so this path is currently unreachable.
fix.migration: v3.26.0 counter file with normal_non_halt_opportunities_count=5 from yesterday's scaffold smoke was migrated: 5 moved to scaffold_no_market_data_records_count, normal_non_halt_opportunities_count reset to 0. All 5 existing 2026-06-09 records were backfilled with evidence_quality=SCAFFOLD_NO_MARKET_DATA.

shared/signal_shadow_preflight.py.purpose: preflight validator for any v3.26 collector

shared/crypto_exposure_policy.py.purpose: hard crypto exposure / laddering / cooldown policy

shared/crypto_exit_policy.py.purpose: structured exit-reason + audit-required + dust-operator-decision + precision guard
